raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to inform on a dispute regarding a fraudulent transaction on my Amex XXXX card. The transaction in question occurred on XX/XX/XXXX for the amount of {$4800.00}, and I have never received an additional card. 

Despite my repeated attempts over the past XXXX months, the claim has been rejected. I would like to reiterate that this transaction was not authorized by me, and I should not be held liable for it. Amex has been just keeping this case open and such a hazzel to make those attempts to follow up on the dispute I kindly request a thorough review of this case and a resolution at your earliest convenience. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
